$comment: Editorial input for scripts/pylon/migrate-articles.ts. sourcePath is relative to astro-docs/. collectionId is the target Pylon collection (currently the 'Nx Knowledge Base' collection). Set weight to override PYLON_DEFAULT_SEARCH_WEIGHT for a single article. extraRedirects covers section index pages when a whole section moves. Entries are the scored migrate-set (support-style, niche, error-driven content); already-migrated articles whose source .mdoc was deleted are removed from this list but stay in src/content/pylon-kb.json, which drives redirects. Kept in docs (broad/evergreen/onboarding): all package-manager workspace guides, keep-nx-versions-in-sync, define-environment-variables, feature-based-testing, advanced-update, standalone-to-monorepo, resolve-circular-dependencies, advanced-update. Borderline resolved 2026-07-08: troubleshoot-nx-install-issues and identify-dependencies-between-folders migrate (graph replaced by static screenshot). Litmus flips migrated 2026-07-08: include-assets-in-build, browser-support, performance-profiling, nx-sandbox-unix-sockets. Batch 2 ratified 2026-07-08 (29 articles, litmus applied across all remaining docs); held back to keep doc clusters intact: angular-rspack trio (handling-configurations, internationalization, migrate-from-webpack), one-storybook publishing trio, change-cache-location + skipping-cache. Sections moved at user request 2026-07-09: concepts/decisions (7 articles; the section index page redirects to the KB collection via extraRedirects) and the 'Creating releases' sidebar group (5 nx-release guides). Full Knowledge Base sidebar tab migrated 2026-07-09 (119 articles) at user request; 4 extremely-low-traffic pages deleted instead (see scripts/pylon/migration-audit.md); the KB tab was removed from sidebar.mts and emptied section hubs redirect via extraRedirects.
